HGSS.1603.0000:
We exchange your Coins for
fabulous prizes! [0200,0000]
HGSS.1603.0001:
Please save your Coins and
come again!
HGSS.1603.0005: Sorry. You can’t carry any more.\f
HGSS.1603.0006:
Your party’s full!
Please make some room before you\r
come back.
HGSS.1603.0009:
Welcome!\f
We exchange your Coins for
fabulous prizes! [0200,0000]
HGSS.1603.0028:
My name is Mr. Game!\f
My heart pounds with excitement when
people enjoy my Coin game!\f
In fact, that’s what I live for!
You look like quite a challenger!\f
Why don’t you play my Coin game?\f
You can get fabulous prizes if
you manage to collect a lot\r
of Coins. [0200,0000]
HGSS.1603.0031:
All right!
Here is your Coin Case!\f
HGSS.1603.0032:
Show me how you play, and my heart
will pound with excitement!\f
HGSS.1603.0033:
Playing my Coin game will make your
heart and my heart both pound with\r
excitement, you know?
HGSS.1603.0034:
My name is Mr. Game!\f
My heart pounds with excitement when
people enjoy my Coin game!\f
In fact, that’s what I live for!
Go ahead and play it!\f
Make my heart pound with excitement!
HGSS.1603.0035:
Go ahead and play my Coin game!\r
Make my heart pound with excitement!
HGSS.1603.0036:
What a feeling!\f
Nothing beats Coin-game spectatorship!
Oh! I almost forgot!\f
You can exchange your Coins for prizes
with the two gentlemen at the table\r
over there.
HGSS.1603.0037:
Did you come back to play
my Coin game?
HGSS.1603.0038:
It seems you need a Coin Case
to play...\f
HGSS.1603.0039:
Mr. Game: Aha!\f
You must be here to play my Coin game!
Come here and I’ll give you a Coin Case!
HGSS.1603.0040:
Mr. Game: Show me how you play and
make my heart pound with excitement!\f
HGSS.1603.0041:
Mr. Game: Huh?\f
Why don’t you sit across from me
and show me how you play?
